# Profit Media

> Profit Media is a digital marketing agency in Israel focused on turning ad budgets into closed deals for high-ticket businesses — not just lead forms in a report.

## What we do
- Campaign management on Facebook, Instagram, and Google Ads
- Smart interactive quizzes that filter low-intent inquiries
- High-converting landing pages
- Ongoing A/B testing and optimization

## Who we serve
Profit Media works with high-ticket businesses that close sales through calls, WhatsApp, or meetings — not shopping carts.

- [Who we serve](https://profitmedia.co.il/#for-whom): Custom products and services, premium tourism, professional services, clinics and healthcare

## How it works
Three-stage system from strategy to ongoing improvement:

- [How it works](https://profitmedia.co.il/#how-it-works): Diagnosis and strategy → setup and launch → measurement and improvement

## Main headline (Hebrew)
עסקאות מהפרסום — לא רק לידים

## Key pages
- [Home](https://profitmedia.co.il/): Main agency website in Hebrew
- [Contact](https://profitmedia.co.il/#contact): Free campaign diagnosis form
- [Privacy policy](https://profitmedia.co.il/privacy): Privacy policy (Hebrew)
- [Accessibility statement](https://profitmedia.co.il/accessibility): Accessibility statement (Hebrew)

## Proof points
- 223+ clients served
- A custom-kitchen client reported more than ILS 200,000 in monthly sales for two consecutive months; the client's identity and exact figures remain confidential
- Up to 46% reduction in cost per lead in the published SKI VIP Travel case
- 6M+ ILS in estimated total managed ad budgets

## Contact
- Website: https://profitmedia.co.il/
- Lead form: https://profitmedia.co.il/#contact
- Free diagnosis — no commitment, response within 24 hours
